library.name: jsQR
library.description: A pure JavaScript QR code reading library used as the camera-scan decode fallback for browsers without the native BarcodeDetector API.

library.name: Noto Sans JP
library.description: TCPDF-embedded-font conversion of Noto Sans JP Regular, used by classes/local/pdf_generator.php so Japanese (and other non-Latin-script) template content renders correctly on generated PDFs instead of as mojibake. See thirdparty/notosansjp/README.md for the full sourcing/conversion process.

copyrights.copyright: 2014-2021, Adobe (Source Han Sans design); Google Fonts distribution
